channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Putin signs off record Russian defense spending as top EU officials visit Kyiv
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Russian President Vladimir Putin approved budget plans, raising 2025 military spending to record levels as Moscow seeks to prevail in the war in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Storm blankets parts of the US during busy holiday travel weekend with more snow and cold forecast
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — The first big snowfall of the season blanketed parts of New York, Pennsylvania and Michigan during the hectic U.S.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, RICK CALLAHAN and CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump says he'll nominate Kash Patel as FBI director to remake the agency. Here's what happens next
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s stunning announcement that he will nominate Kash Patel as FBI director sets the stage for a fresh round of turbulence at a law enforcement agency tasked with protecting the homeland and investigating federal crimes.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A landmark climate change case will open at the top UN court as island nations fear rising seas
item.description: THE HAGUE (AP) — The top United Nations court will take up the largest case in its history on Monday, when it opens two weeks of hearings into what countries worldwide are legally required to do to combat climate change and help vulnerable nations fight its devastating impact.
item.dc:creator: MOLLY QUELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about Kash Patel, Trump’s pick to lead the FBI
item.description: Kash Patel has called for radical changes at the FBI and was a fierce and vocal critic of the bureau’s work as it investigated ties between Russia and Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cancel unused credit cards or keep them? Here are pros and cons
item.description: Keeping an account open carries some benefits, but closing a credit card may make sense in some scenarios.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's picks for key positions in his second administration
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has filled the key posts for his second term in office, prioritizing loyalty to him after he felt bruised and hampered by internal squabbling during his first term.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump taps Kash Patel for FBI director, an ally who would aid in his effort to upend law enforcement
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says he will nominate Kash Patel to serve as FBI director, turning to a fierce ally to upend America’s premier law enforcement agency and rid the government of perceived “conspirators.”.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Missing hiker survived 50 days in Canadian wilderness, at times in frigid temps
item.description: A 20-year-old hiker who had been missing for weeks was found alive in the wilderness of British Columbia, the Royal Canadian Mountain Police confirmed on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, Fox 5

item.title: An Israeli strike in Gaza kills World Central Kitchen workers. Israel says 1 was an Oct. 7 attacker
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — An Israeli airstrike on a car in the Gaza Strip on Saturday killed five people, including employees of World Central Kitchen.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA, TIA GOLDENBERG and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hidden gems of early Cyber Monday deals
item.description: BestReviews has assembled a collection of top-quality gifts priced under $50, currently available at discounts of up to 60% off.
item.dc:creator: Lizzy Briskin, ABC 4

item.title: Southwest Airlines to end cabin service earlier on flights to reduce chance of injury
item.description: Southwest Airlines is ending cabin service earlier to reduce the risk of in-flight turbulence injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Credit card debt is soaring – what to know about getting out of it
item.description: With credit card debt reaching an all-time high, now is the time for the most pertinent questions and answers surrounding a difficult reality many Americans are facing.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, KRON4

item.title: Pennsylvania restaurant ordered to pay $184,000 for withholding tips
item.description: The U.S. Department of Labor says Sly Fox Brewing Company in Pittsburgh "unlawfully kept a portion of the tips earned by workers, allowing managers to participate in the restaurant’s tip pool.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Why your favorite catalogs are smaller this holiday season
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — Honey, they shrunk the catalogs. While retailers hope to go big this holiday season, customers may notice that the printed gift guides arriving in their mailboxes are smaller. Many of the millions of catalogs getting sent to U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SHARP, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Lake Effect Snow Warning extended; Sunday closures and travel alerts
item.description: (WJET/WFXP) — After a break in the snow Saturday, snow-covered roads and cars are still a major issue for thousands across the region after more than two feet fell, and some areas even saw more than three feet as crews continue to work around the clock to clear the roads, with interstate restriction
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Anti-Israel protests pop up on Black Friday during International Day of Solidarity with the Palestinian People
item.description: Anti-Israel protesters took to the streets in several cities on Friday to call for an end to U.S. aid to Israel and an end to the war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Head of Ohio's teacher pension fund retires Sunday, saying fund is strong despite staff vacancies
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — The outgoing head of Ohio's troubled teachers retirement system said that she is leaving the fund in strong fiscal condition, despite the turmoil at the top that her successor will inherit.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Watch: Colorado officer uses kid's bike during pursuit
item.description: A Lone Tree police officer went above and beyond to try and catch a theft suspect who fled on a scooter in a neighborhood.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus after disastrous Thanksgiving loss
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, Fox 5

item.title: Venezuelan gang members linked to violent apartment takeover arrested in New York City
item.description: Tren de Aragua members Denyeer Aramillo Meneses, 23, and Edison Pena Angulo, 25, were arrested in the Bronx. Both were pictured in a viral video of a Colorado armed break in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cucumbers sold in 26 states recalled over Salmonella concerns
item.description: A produce company based in Arizona is recalling whole cucumbers that were distributed in more than two dozen states and Canada due to Salmonella concerns.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Suspect accused in dad's camping murder 'cut off' from self-defense claim after backtracking on confession
item.description: The suspect in the murder of a Montana dad and avid outdoorsman pleaded not guilty Tuesday after allegedly claiming self-defense in his confession to police.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sniper kills Florida man who fired 200 rounds at neighboring condos
item.description: A Florida man was killed by a Volusia Sheriff's Office sniper after he reportedly fired more than 200 rounds at neighboring condos over several hours on Thanksgiving morning, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, NewsNation

item.title: DNA test brings NY father, daughter together after nearly 50 years
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Thanksgiving is more than a tradition – it's a time for loved ones and families to get together, to embrace and give thanks for all that is good in their lives. For one family in Rockland County, this is a special holiday. A daughter and her biological father are together.
item.dc:creator: Marvin Scott, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 tips to avoid overspending this holiday season
item.description: Nearly 30% of credit card users are still paying off last year's holiday debt. Here are five tips to avoid overspending.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman to reunite with brother missing for 25 years after spotting his picture in news
item.description: A man missing since 1999 has been identified and is set to reunite with his family after media coverage helped bring the decades-long case to a close.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Atlantic hurricane season comes to an end, leaving widespread damage in its wake
item.description: The 2024 Atlantic hurricane season comes to a close Saturday, bringing to an end a season that saw 11 hurricanes compared to the average seven, and death and destruction hundreds of miles from where storms came ashore on the U.S. Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: ISABELLA O'MALLEY and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man ships 'suspicious package,' later caught with guns, nearly $3 million of illegal mushrooms
item.description: (KTLA) — Authorities in Riverside County, California, have uncovered what they called a "large-scale psilocybin mushroom cultivation operation," resulting in the arrest of a 43-year-old man. Deputies responded in August to reports of a suspicious package at a business.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: JonBenét Ramsey: Boulder Police address case after Netflix series
item.description: Without specifically addressing the docuseries, Boulder Police called many of the claims in the show "completely false.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, NewsNation

item.title: Why retailers still see Black Friday as the high point of the holiday shopping season
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — After weeks of plugging increasingly inviting discounts, retailers in the United States and several other countries are preparing for prime time: Black Friday, the bargain bonanza that still reigns as the unofficial kickoff of the holiday shopping season even if it's lost some luster
item.dc:creator: ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Child's toes 'severed' by lawnmower at Utah daycare; state wants it to shut down
item.description: A childcare center in southern Utah is losing its license and must cease operations by Dec. 4 after a child's toes were "severed" by a lawnmower.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, Fox 5

item.title: Bay Area airport among 10 worst for on-time Thanksgiving travel: report
item.description: Depending on what airport your friends or relatives are flying out of, you may want to show a little extra compassion this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: Virginia pilot, dog killed in New York plane crash; 2 other dogs found alive
item.description: A Virginia pilot and a rescue dog he was transporting were killed after a plane he was flying crashed in New York on Sunday, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Jenny Gable, WGN 9
